docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AS TO DEFT NCS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA SELECT FINE WINE & LIQUOR ARENA WINE CAFE, AKA SELECT WINE & SPIRITS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU

DISCOVERY 612, - PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS DENIED. THE COURT DOES NOT FIND THAT PLAINTIFF HAS MET ITS BURDEN TO SHOW THAT THERE IS A DANGER THAT THE PROPERTY SOUGHT TO BE ATTACHED WILL BE MADE UNAVAILABLE TO LEVY BY OTHER THAN CONCEALMENT OR IMPAIRMENT IN VALUE. THE COURT ALSO NOTES THAT THE DESCRIPTION OF THE PROPERTY TO BE ATTACHED IS NOT ADEQUATE TO PERMIT THE DEFENDANT TO IDENTIFY THE SPECIFIC PROPERTY SOUGHT TO BE ATTACHED. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

- Ex Parte Application For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Jun-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert Resner, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade Association
Andrew Harris, Atty. appeared via telephone for Defendant and opposing party: NCS, Inc. dba Select Fine Wine & Liquor Arena Wine Cafe

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Ex Parte Application For Writ Of Attachment is denied. The court does not find that Plaintiff has met its burden to show that there is a danger that the property sought to be attached will be made unavailable to levy by other than concealment or impairment in value. The court also notes that the description of the property to be attached is not adequate to permit the defendant to identify the specific property sought to be attached. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
